channel.title: XKey Updates
channel.description: XKey - Vietnamese Input Method for macOS

item.title: Version 1.2.21 (Build 20260522)
item.description:
What's New

fix: Smart Switch per-app engine state not restored on app switch

Fix two combined defects causing engine state ('V'/'E') to not be

remembered per-app when switching between rule-controlled apps (iTerm

with title rule) and non-rule apps (Ghostty).

Defect 1: handleSmartSwitch's IS-disabled guard was at the top, blocking

rule restore (preRuleInputSourceId cleanup) and Smart Switch per-app

lookup. Moved guard AFTER rule restore so:

  • preRuleInputSourceId doesn't leak across app switches
  • Smart Switch can query per-app data after IS is restored

Defect 2: handleInputSourceChange blindly set engine state based on

global IS config (shouldEnable), ignoring Smart Switch per-app data.

Now consults SmartSwitchManager.getAppLanguage() to override shouldEnable

when app has saved English preference.

Coordination: Added smartSwitchHandledBundleId flag to prevent

handleInputSourceChange (~150ms async) from overriding engine state

that handleSmartSwitch (~50ms) already set correctly.

Xem chi tiết trên GitHub
